response.justification: The candidate is a strong senior generalist with impressive breadth (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, low-latency systems, testing culture), but he does not meet the core mandatory requirements: his C++ experience is limited to a ~7-month role at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a university thesis, far short of the required 5–10 years of hands-on Windows C++. He also lacks SQL Server/Oracle depth (MongoDB/MySQL instead) and has no Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain experience — RIDE Capital was consumer-facing investment fintech, not institutional capital markets.
strengths: Extensive senior-level engineering experience with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through conference talks, workshops, and training courses
concerns: No substantial recent C++ experience; last professional C++ role ended in 2015 and Windows-platform C++ depth is unproven
No Fixed Income, derivatives, or capital-markets/investment-banking domain exposure
Database experience centers on MongoDB/MySQL rather than the required SQL Server or Oracle

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and communication skills
